description_long: This object consists of two upright stone grave markers set on a rectangular patch of earth bordered by a stone or concrete frame. Each grave marker features a cross at the top, with the left marker being slightly shorter and lighter in color, and the right marker taller and darker with a more pronounced base. The ground surface is covered with patches of moss and dirt, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The grave markers are detailed with engraved circular motifs beneath the crosses, though inscriptions are not clearly visible. The overall appearance is somber and weathered, typical of a small, traditional graveyard plot. The materials and design evoke a sense of permanence and respect for the deceased.
description: Two upright stone grave markers with crosses stand on a mossy, rectangular plot bordered by stone. The markers are weathered and detailed, evoking a traditional graveyard scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing both grave markers with crosses, engraved motifs, and the mossy ground surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the grave markers and the rectangular plot's length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the grave markers and the full extent of the mossy ground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the markers and the rectangular plot's depth.
